fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the demand forecast.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the demand forecast.

fields.name: View By
fields.tooltip: Specifies by which period amounts are displayed.

fields.name: Forecast Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies one of the following two types when you create a demand forecast entry: sales item or component item.

fields.name: Forecast By Locations
fields.tooltip: Use this if you want to create a forecast entry including the locations.

fields.name: Forecast By Variants
fields.tooltip: Use this if you want to create a forecast entry including the variants.

fields.name: Quantity Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies how amounts are displayed. Net Change: The net change in the balance for the selected period. Balance at Date: The balance as of the last day in the selected period.

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dates that will be used to filter the amounts in the window.
